message:
feat(doctor): add per-run artifact manifest with typed inventory, existence checks, replay commands, and HTML rendering

Introduces a structured artifact manifest system that catalogues every
artifact produced by a capture run, checks their on-disk presence, and
generates shell-ready replay commands for post-mortem investigation.

runmeta.rs — core types and logic:
- New enums: ArtifactRole (Contract, Media, Replay, Evidence,
  Diagnostics, Session) and structs ArtifactEntry, ReplayCommand,
  RunArtifactManifest
- RunMeta gains artifact_manifest: Option<String> field
- artifact_entries(): builds the full inventory from RunMeta fields —
  run_meta.json, run_summary.txt, capture.tape, output video, snapshot,
  evidence_ledger, ttyd logs, tmux session/captures, VHS docker log.
  Each entry gets a typed role, purpose description, and exists=bool
  from Path::exists()
- replay_commands(): generates 3 shell commands:
  1. inspect_run_meta: cat run_meta.json | jq (or cat)
  2. tail_evidence_ledger: tail -n 80 <ledger_path>
  3. replay_capture_tape: vhs <tape_path>
  Uses shell_single_quote() for safe argument escaping
- write_artifact_manifest(): serializes RunArtifactManifest to JSON
  alongside the run directory, returning the path if written
- 9 tests covering artifact inventory completeness, missing-file
  detection, replay command generation, empty-state handling, and
  manifest JSON serialization

capture.rs — threading through capture lifecycle:
- artifact_manifest_path computed at run start
- Dry-run path: writes RunMeta with artifact_manifest, generates
  manifest, includes in JSON output and UI messages
- Initial and final RunMeta both include artifact_manifest field
- write_artifact_manifest() called after initial meta write

doctor.rs:
- CaptureSmokeObservability gains artifact_manifest field
- load_capture_smoke_observability() propagates from RunMeta
- Tests updated with artifact_manifest assertions

report.rs:
- HTML report renders artifact_manifest as an artifact link
- New "Replay Commands" section in HTML cards with styled <pre> blocks
- CSS gains .command class for monospace command display + h3 styling
- Tests assert artifact_manifest link and all 3 replay commands

suite.rs:
- SuiteRunIndexEntry gains artifact_manifest field
- build_suite_observability_summary() propagates from RunMeta
- Tests updated with artifact_manifest assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1436,10 +1451,18 @@ exit 1
 
         let observability = super::load_capture_smoke_observability(temp.path(), "doctor_full_run")
             .expect("load observability");
+        let expected_artifact_manifest = run_dir
+            .join("run_artifact_manifest.json")
+            .display()
+            .to_string();
 
         assert_eq!(observability.run_name, "doctor_full_run");
         assert_eq!(observability.status, "failed");
         assert_eq!(observability.trace_id.as_deref(), Some("trace-xyz"));
+        assert_eq!(
+            observability.artifact_manifest.as_deref(),
+            Some(expected_artifact_manifest.as_str())
+        );
         assert_eq!(
             observability.failure_signature.as_deref(),
             Some("vhs_ttyd_handshake_failed")
